purpose: No-secret public-release closeout tracker. Store evidence references only; do not store credentials, operator tokens, private report exports, provider keys, or legal advice in this file.

items.label: WWW Hosting and Certificate
requiredEvidence: Firebase Hosting custom domain for www.luxveritas.media is added and verified
DNS record for www.luxveritas.media exists and resolves
https://www.luxveritas.media returns HTTP 200 or redirects to https://luxveritas.media

items.label: Inbox Provider
requiredEvidence: Approved sender domain is verified with the provider
RESEND_API_KEY is active in Firebase Secret Manager
Functions using inbox secrets are redeployed
Live form matrix write test confirms inbox delivery
Pending inbox replay is available to an approved operator

items.label: Privacy Approval
requiredEvidence: Privacy page reviewed against actual data practices
node tools/qa-release-readiness.mjs no longer reports Privacy as a blocker
commands: LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_ITEM=privacy LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_STATUS=approved LUX_LEGAL_REVIEWED_BY="Reviewer Name" node tools/set-legal-review-status.mjs

items.label: Terms Approval
requiredEvidence: Terms page reviewed against actual site behavior
node tools/qa-release-readiness.mjs no longer reports Terms as a blocker
commands: LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_ITEM=terms LUX_LEGAL_REVIEW_STATUS=approved LUX_LEGAL_REVIEWED_BY="Reviewer Name" node tools/set-legal-review-status.mjs
